items.title: Best 2026 Copilot+ PC deals under $1,000 from Best Buy’s 4th of July sale
items.summary: Best Buy’s 4th of July sale is serving up loads of solid deals on Windows laptops and desktops, with plenty of options landing below the $1,000 mark. In addition to the budget-friendly everyday machines starting at $329.99 shipped, you’ll find a handful of deals on more capable Copilot+ notebooks right now as well, powered by Qualcomm’s Snapdragon X2 Plus, AMD Ryzen AI 400-series, and Intel Core Ultra Series 3 “Panther Lake” chips. While some of these models saw discounts during last week’s Tech Fest Prime Day event, Best Buy is now offering a few sub-$1,000 options for anyone looking to upgrade without jumping into premium pricing territory.

Similar to its last deployment, the new charger is also a 120kW DC Charger unit with two bays. As part of its introductory offer, Gentari is also offering 15% discount for a limited time. […]

items.title: Stock is slipping and the price just fell further, grab this drafting chair for your standing desk at $90 (Reg. $140)
items.summary:
Marsail Ergonomic Drafting Chair

Buy for $90 (Reg. $140)

What we love

We covered this drafting chair a few days back when it fell to $100, well, today it’s even less. Since it’s a drafting chair, it’s a solid solution for standing desks that can be used at both sitting and standing heights. You may want to act fast, last we checked there were only 9 left in stock.

items.title: 4th of July Apple TV deals from $2: Disclosure Day, Boogie Nights, Reservoir Dogs, Jackie Brown, Wag the Dog, more
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best Apple TV deals is now ready to roll, and we have a ton of absolute classics on tap for July 4th as well as the first Apple TV deal on Spielberg’s new Disclosure Day. Others include Boogie Nights, Reservoir Dogs, Jackie Brown, Wag the Dog, Executive Decision, Speed 2-Movie Collection, Heat (1995), and more. On your way down scope out the ongoing all-time low on Apple’s AirTag 2 4-pack,  M5 iPad Pro deals at up to $350 off, AirPods 4 at nearly 25% off, and the most affordable 13-inch M4 iPad Air at $200 off. The 4th of July app deals await below.

items.title: Streamline your office with HUANUO’s FlowLift Pro monitor arm down at $25.50 (Reg. $50)
items.summary:
HUANUO FlowLift Pro Monitor Arm

Buy for $25.50 (Reg. $50)

What we love

This arm is build to last “twice as long” as long thanks to the brand’s enhanced MechaSpring arm. It also features an upgraded LockSteady system that is said to enhance strength and ease of adjustments.

items.title: Autel’s MaxiCharger AC Pro level 2 charger adds up to 70 miles per hour to your EV at its $909 2026 low
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Autel is giving folks another chance to grab its most powerful MaxiCharger AC Pro 80A Level 2 EV Charger for $908.98 shipped, beating out the brand’s direct website pricing by $160. It’s down from a $1,299 full price here, which we’ve regularly seen dropped down to $1,069 on average in 2026, with less frequent falls to $909. This is a $390 markdown to the best price we have tracked in 2026, only beaten out by the $899 low we last spotted in September 2025. You can also find the brand’s other EV chargers and diagnostic devices at discounted prices in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: These sunglasses are now even less, grab three pairs for roughly $3 each
items.summary:
KALIYADI Polarized Sunglasses (3-pack)

Buy for $9.50 (Reg. $20)

What we love

These are even less than we tend to see them go for right now. We scour loads of listings to find options like this for $10, and today you’re able to cash in for less than that. You’re pretty close to $3 each right now.

items.title: Retractable USB-C cable headlines this 6-in-1 outlet extender, now $14

TESSAN 6-in-1 Retractable USB-C Outlet Extender

Buy for $14 (Reg. $17)

What we love

This outlet extender sets itself apart with a retractable USB-C cable. This isn’t the first time we’ve seen this idea, but it’s still pretty rare and you’ve currently got the chance to scoop it up at a nice discount.

items.title: Take an extra 30% off adidas slides, clogs, more now priced from $16
items.summary: We just scoured the adidas sale page for summer-friendly shoes while the brand’s extra 30% off SAVE promo code is live. You can peruse all of the options right here. Our top picks include the Adilette Aqua Slides, Adissage 360rec Slides, and more. Just note that you can also score this wrinkle-free dress shirt for $12.50, scope out PUMA’s semi-annual sale from $8, and much more in our apparel guide. Head below to see today’s adidas picks.

items.title: Hiboy’s July 4th Sale restocks the latest EX11 full suspension e-bike with a 100-mile range at its $1,300 low, more from $310
items.summary: Hiboy has a 4th of July Sale running through the weekend with up to 58% savings on a selection of EVs, like the recently restocked EX11 Full Suspension Electric Bike at $1,299.99 shipped. This new model hit the market back in March with a $2,000 MSRP, which we saw quickly sell out by mid-April and only recently got restocked in its Chameleon colorway. Now, you can grab one again here with the same $700 markdown that we saw when it launched, giving you another opportunity at its lowest tracked price. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.
